title: Login page not loading
description: The login page keeps showing a blank white screen after entering credentials. This started happening since yesterday.

title: Payment failed during checkout
description: I tried to complete my order but the payment is failing with error code 402. Using Visa card.

title: Request for invoice copy
description: I need a copy of the invoice for my purchase made on March 15th (Order #ORD-7842).

title: App crashing on Android
description: The mobile app crashes immediately after opening on my Samsung Galaxy S23. Version 2.3.1.

title: Slow loading times on dashboard
description: The dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load every time. This is affecting my daily work.

title: Account suspension issue
description: My account was suddenly suspended without any notification. Please check and reactivate it.

title: Feature request: Dark mode
description: It would be great if you could add a dark mode option for the web application.

title: Refund not received
description: I requested a refund 10 days ago but haven't received the money back yet.

title: Email notifications not working
description: I am currently facing an issue where I am not receiving any email notifications for new messages or updates..

title: Wrong product delivered
description: I ordered a wireless keyboard but received a mouse instead. Order number #ORD-8921.

title: Password reset link expired
description: The password reset link I received keeps saying it's expired even though I just requested it.

title: Unable to upload files
description: File upload feature is not working. Getting 'Upload failed' error for all file types.
